summary_one_line: ICC profile whose colorspace/PCS FOURCC signatures (Lab/MCH3/XYZ) select a segmented tone-curve path whose domain check fails for all segments, exiting the loop.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC profile header whose data-colorspace / PCS FOURCC fields at offsets 0x10-0x17 carry signatures such as 'Lab Lab ' or 'MCH3XYZ ' (rather than 'RGB XYZ '), driving construction of a segmented tone curve (nSegments>0) whose per-segment domain test (R > x0 && R <= x1) fails for every segment, so EvalSegmentedFn runs the descending loop to exhaustion and takes the i<0 (false) loop-exit side at line 721.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry 'Lab Lab ' (4c 61 62 20) and 'MCH3XYZ ' colorspace signatures at offsets 0x10-0x17; on these the blocker false side is reached (W hits the loop-exit and the line 754 return), with W invoking EvalSegmentedFn 3.82M times vs L 204K and the L 721 row showing F=0.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds carry 'RGB XYZ ' (52 47 42 20 / 58 59 5a 20) at offsets 0x10-0x17; these drive a path where every loop iteration either matches a segment domain and returns early or the loop body never falls through, so the false (loop-exit) side of line 721 is never taken (L shows T=204000 F=0 at line 721).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc I2SRandReplace reads the CMP operands recorded when the ICC parser compares the input colorspace FOURCC against expected literals, then substitutes those exact 4-byte signatures into the input at the matching offsets, deterministically producing the colorspace-tagged header naive/value_profile reach only by chance havoc; lineage shows I2S-floor dash rows on both winners.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked side is the false (loop-exit) branch of the descending segment loop at line 721 in EvalSegmentedFn.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
Source line:     for (i = (int) g->nSegments - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
Globally blocked side: F  (false branch)

evidence_trail.claim: Reaching the false side falls through the loop to return MINUS_INF, which only the winner hits.
Winner-resolving seeds carry 'Lab Lab ' / 'MCH3XYZ ' colorspace signatures at offsets 0x10-0x17.
Loser-blocking seeds carry 'RGB XYZ ' at offsets 0x10-0x17.
The byte diff concentrates W vs L divergence at the colorspace-FOURCC offsets 0x10-0x17.
On winners EvalSegmentedFn is invoked vastly more (3.82M) than on losers (204K), and the L 721 false side count is zero.
Both decisive pairs differ from their loser by exactly the I2S technique.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace scans the input for byte sequences matching a logged CMP operand and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2114 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0aedfccd0898c3ff` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 16; corroborated with vpc seed 055e0c9e12c0c297 which has 2 dash rows at depths 11 and 12. Dash rows are exclusive to cmplog/vpc in the 4-fuzzer set, direct lower-bound evidence of I2S contribution in both winners' ancestor chains.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where flipping only the colorspace/PCS FOURCC bytes (Lab/MCH3 vs RGB) does NOT change whether the segmented-curve loop exits via its false side — i.e., naive reaches the loop-exit branch at the same rate as cmplog regardless of the FOURCC literal.

weakest_evidence_point: The causal link from the colorspace FOURCC bytes to a segmented tone curve whose domain check fails for every segment is inferred from the call chain and invocation-count divergence, not directly traced through the curve-construction dataflow.
